arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MQ broker.

authentication_strategy.description: The authentication strategy used by the broker, such as SIMPLE or LDAP.

auto_minor_version_upgrade.description: Indicates whether automatic minor version upgrades are enabled for the broker.

broker_id.description: The unique identifier of the MQ broker.

broker_name.description: The name of the MQ broker.

configuration.description: The configuration settings applied to the broker, including ID and revision number.

deployment_mode.description: The deployment mode of the broker, such as SINGLE_INSTANCE or ACTIVE_STANDBY_MULTI_AZ.

encryption_options.description: The encryption settings for the broker, including KMS key ID and whether to use AWS-owned key.

engine_type.description: The type of broker engine, such as ACTIVEMQ or RABBITMQ.

engine_version.description: The version of the broker engine.

host_instance_type.description: The type of host instance for the broker.

id.description: The ID of the MQ broker.

instances.description: Details of broker instances, including console URL, endpoints, and IP address.

ldap_server_metadata.description: The LDAP server settings used for authentication, including host details and search criteria.

logs.description: The logging configuration for the broker, specifying audit and general log settings.

maintenance_window_start_time.description: The scheduled maintenance window for the broker, including day, time, and timezone.

publicly_accessible.description: Indicates if the broker is publicly accessible.

security_groups.description: The security groups associated with the broker.

storage_type.description: The type of storage used by the broker, such as EBS or EFS.

subnet_ids.description: The IDs of subnets associated with the broker.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the broker.

user.description: Details about users who have access to the broker, including console access and group memberships.
